top_signals.title: Venezuela Quake Death Toll Rises to 164 as Rescue Efforts Expand
top_signals.summary: At least 164 people have died and more than 1,000 have been injured after significant back-to-back earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday, toppling buildings and severely damaging the country’s main international airport. Government officials are warning the toll will rise.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: As Europe roasts in a heat wave, Asia’s air-con makers see robust business
top_signals.summary: Air conditioning is rare in Europe and people are struggling to stay cool as ‌searing heat ‌claims lives, disrupts power supplies and shuts schools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index falls to 2591 down 43 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Thursday, June 25 2026, the Baltic Dry Index decreased by 43 points, reaching 2591 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry ...
